name: SLR Investment Corp.
summary: PART I SLR Investment Corp. (the Company, SLRC, we or our), a Maryland corporation formed in November 2007, is a closed-end, externally managed, non-diversified management investment company that has elected to be regulated as a business development company (BDC) under the Investment Company Act of 1940, as amended (the 1940 Act). Furthermore, as the Company is an investment company, it continues to apply the guidance in Financial Accounting Standards Board (FASB) Accounting Standards Codificati...
